sections.content: Mastering influencing skills can make people listen to you, believe in you and align towards your value proposition. Effective Influencing skills help you build a credible image that garners lot of support and trust, from both the internal and external stakeholders. Influence to Win is a two day interactive workshop equipping with the right skills and techniques to be more confident and persuasive. With real life simulation and active role play scenarios, the program aims to coach for selling more ideas and winning more business.

content: Understand what is influence and why it is so important to possess it
Create an excellent first impression and body language to build rapport and trust
Understand stakeholders perspective and personality type
Use Aristotle’s ideas of ethos, pathos and logos in building influence
Understand Robert Cialdini’s influencing principles for various situations to get results
Learn key tips and techniques of influencing
